title: Min Element in Max-Heap
description: The minimum element of a max-heap is always a leaf. Leaves are at indices ⌊n/2⌋+1 to n (1-indexed). Find and return the minimum element of the heap without sorting.
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: n integers forming a valid max-heap (1-indexed).

botCodes.code: let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let a=Array.make(n+1)0 in for i=1 to n do a.(i)<-Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id done;let m=ref a.(n/2+1) in for i=n/2+2 to n do if a.(i)< !m then m:=a.(i) done;Printf.printf"%d\n" !m
